---
title: "Final Exam"
# author: "Type Your Name Here"
# date: today
format: 
    pdf:        
        pdf-engine: lualatex
        template-partials:
            - ../../doc-class.tex
        include-in-header:
            - ../../math.tex
            - text: |
                \usepackage{xcolor} 
                \usepackage{alltt}
                \usepackage{enumitem}
                \usepackage[letterpaper,top=1in,bottom=0.89in,left=1in,right=1in]{geometry}
                \AtBeginDocument{
                    \renewcommand{\theexercise}{\arabic{exercise}}
                }
                \newcommand{\red}[1]{\textcolor{red}{\textbf{#1}}}
                \newcommand{\mc}[1]{%
                    \begin{enumerate}
                    \setcounter{enumi}{0}
                    \renewcommand{\labelenumi}{\Alph{enumi}.}
                    #1
                    \end{enumerate}
                }
        mainfont: Libertinus Serif
        sansfont: Libertinus Sans
        monofont: Latin Modern Mono
        monofontoptions:
            - Scale=0.95
        mathfont: Libertinus Math
        highlight-style: arrow
params:
    show_solution: false
filters:
    - ../../solution-filter.lua
crossref:
    chapters: false
---


# Problems
